Metadata.title: Jetforge Labs | Custom Software Development & Tech Solutions
Metadata.description: Jetforge Labs builds high-quality custom software, mobile apps, cloud infrastructure, and AI-powered solutions. From MVP to enterprise scale, we deliver technology that drives real business results.
Metadata.keywords: custom software development, mobile app development, cloud devops, AI automation, MVP development, software factory, tech solutions, security audits

Hero.subheading: From concept to deployment, we deliver scalable, high-quality software products that move your business forward.

Services.heading: Our Services
Services.subheading: End-to-end software development services tailored to your needs.

customSoftware.title: Custom Software
customSoftware.description: Tailored solutions designed to match your unique business processes and goals.

mobileApps.title: Mobile Apps
mobileApps.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications that deliver seamless user experiences.

cloudDevOps.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloudDevOps.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines that keep your systems running.

aiAutomation.title: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.description: Intelligent automation and machine learning integrations to streamline operations.
aiAutomation.tagline: Put AI to work in your business

mvpDevelopment.title: MVP Development
mvpDevelopment.description: Rapid prototyping and MVP delivery to validate your ideas and reach market fast.

securityAudits.title: Security Audits
securityAudits.description: Comprehensive security assessments to protect your applications and data.
securityAudits.tagline: Find the gaps before attackers do

Build.heading: What We Build
Build.subheading: A look at the kind of products and systems we ship — and what you get when we do.

mvp.name: MVP / 0→1 Product Builds
mvp.description: From a validated idea to a launch-ready product in weeks — auth, payments, and your core flows wired end to end.
mvp.idealFor: Founders validating a new product or preparing to raise.
mvp.outcome: A production MVP that real users can sign up for and pay through.

web.name: Web Apps
web.description: Fast, SEO-ready web applications, dashboards, and customer portals built on the modern React stack.
web.idealFor: SaaS platforms, admin panels, and data-rich internal dashboards.
web.outcome: Server-rendered apps that stay fast as features and traffic grow.

mobile.name: Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps from a single React Native codebase, shipped to both stores.
mobile.idealFor: Consumer products and companion apps that need native reach.
mobile.outcome: One codebase live on the App Store and Google Play.

ai.name: AI Agents & LLM Integrations
ai.description: Production LLM features and autonomous agents — retrieval, tool use, and workflow automation wired into your product.
ai.idealFor: Support automation, document processing, and internal copilots.
ai.outcome: Agents that do real work, with guardrails and observability built in.

backend.name: Backend, APIs & Integrations
backend.description: Robust APIs and third-party integrations that connect your systems and hold up under load.
backend.idealFor: Headless backends and connecting CRMs, ERPs, and payment providers.
backend.outcome: Typed, documented APIs deployed with zero-downtime migrations.

cloud.name: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.description: Infrastructure-as-code, containerized deploys, and CI/CD pipelines that ship changes safely.
cloud.idealFor: Teams scaling their infrastructure or hardening their release process.
cloud.outcome: Push-to-deploy pipelines with monitoring and one-command rollbacks.

tools.name: Internal Tools & Automation
tools.description: Custom dashboards and automations that retire spreadsheets and manual operations.
tools.idealFor: Ops-heavy teams drowning in repetitive, manual workflows.
tools.outcome: Manual processes turned into reliable, one-click workflows.

About.paragraph1: Jetforge Labs is a tech solutions company focused on building reliable, scalable products for startups and established businesses alike. We combine technical expertise with a pragmatic approach to deliver solutions that work.
About.paragraph2: Our team of engineers, designers, and product strategists work closely with you to understand your challenges and craft software that solves real problems.

Contact.subheading: Ready to start your next project? Reach out and let's talk.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, goals, and timeline...
Contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Footer.description: Software studio specializing in custom products, mobile apps, cloud infrastructure, and AI. Built to scale, shipped to matter.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Jetforge Labs and all its applications and services.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.p1: Jetforge Labs OÜ ("we", "us", or "our") operates websites, mobile applications, and other digital products and services (collectively, "Services"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use any of our Services.
intro.p2: By accessing or using our Services, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the terms of this policy, please do not access our Services.

collect.heading: Information We Collect
collect.p1: We may collect the following types of information:
collect.item1: Personal information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and any messages you send through our contact forms.
collect.item2: Usage data collected automatically, including device information, browser type, operating system, IP address, and interaction patterns within our Services.
collect.item3: Analytics data through third-party services to understand how our Services are used and to improve user experience.
collect.item4: Advertising identifiers and related data when our applications display ads, used to serve relevant advertisements.

use.heading: How We Use Your Information
use.p1: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
use.item1: To provide, maintain, and improve our Services.
use.item2: To communicate with you, including responding to inquiries and sending service-related notices.
use.item3: To analyze usage trends and optimize the performance and user experience of our Services.
use.item4: To display advertisements within our applications, including personalized ads where applicable.
use.item5: To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.p1: Our Services may integrate with third-party services that collect information independently. These may include:
thirdParty.item1: Analytics providers (e.g., Google Analytics, Firebase Analytics) to track usage and performance.
thirdParty.item2: Advertising networks (e.g., Google AdMob) to display ads within our applications.
thirdParty.item3: Cloud hosting and infrastructure providers to store and process data securely.
thirdParty.p2: These third-party services have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them. We are not responsible for the practices of these third parties.

security.heading: Data Storage & Security
security.p1: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
security.p2: However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.p1: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.item1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
rights.item2: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
rights.item3: Request deletion of your personal data.
rights.item4: Object to or restrict the processing of your personal data.
rights.p2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the information provided below.

children.heading: Children's Privacy
children.p1: Our Services are not directed to children under the age of 13 (or the applicable age of consent in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a child without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

changes.heading: Changes to This Policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
